steps.title: Set up
steps.content: 1 leuga = 6,500 pedes. Multiply to convert 4.6 leugas: 4.6 × 6,500.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: As a final check, make sure the computed value answers exactly what the question asks for. The work above gives $29900$; substituting or interpreting it in the original condition satisfies the requirement, so $29900$ is the value to enter.
